title: Sales Associate CV Example UK — Retail & Floor Sales

cv.name: Ryan O'Connor
cv.title: Sales Associate
cv.summary: Energetic sales associate with 3 years on premium UK retail floors. Consistently exceeded personal sales targets through consultative selling, strong product knowledge, and building repeat customer relationships.

bullets: Exceeded monthly sales targets by 24% over 6 consecutive quarters
Increased average transaction value by 15% through accessory upselling
Named Employee of the Month twice for conversion and mystery shop scores
Processed returns and exchanges while preserving customer loyalty
Supported stock replenishment and floor resets during peak seasons
